case_title: VERONICA ALEGRIA VS. ALASKA AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,262.00 FILED BY ALEGRIA, VERONICA AS TO DEFENDANT ALASKA AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
